Actions.Text: REFERRED TO HOUSING, CONSTRUCTION AND COMMUNITY DEVELOPMENT

Title: Enacts the "Housing mobility mortgage study act"
Summary: Enacts the "Housing mobility mortgage study act" to direct the commissioner of housing and community renewal, in consultation with the state of New York mortgage agency (SONYMA) to study the potential impacts of establishing a state-backed housing mobility mortgage program within the state of New York.
ActClause: AN ACT to study the potential impacts of establishing a state-backed mobility mortgage program
